inputs.label: Head Length
inputs.businessContext: Maximum front-to-back length of the baby's head in centimeters.

businessContext_i18n.en: Maximum front-to-back length of the baby's head in centimeters.
businessContext_i18n.de: Maximale fronto-okzipitale Länge des Babykopfes in Zentimetern.
businessContext_i18n.fr: Longueur maximale antéro-postérieure de la tête du bébé en centimètres.
businessContext_i18n.es: Longitud máxima de adelante hacia atrás de la cabeza del bebé en centímetros.

inputs.label: Head Width
inputs.businessContext: Maximum width of the baby's head in centimeters.

businessContext_i18n.en: Maximum width of the baby's head in centimeters.
businessContext_i18n.de: Maximale Breite des Babykopfes in Zentimetern.
businessContext_i18n.fr: Largeur maximale de la tête du bébé en centimètres.
businessContext_i18n.es: Ancho máximo de la cabeza del bebé en centímetros.

inputs.label: Head Height
inputs.businessContext: Height from crown to base of skull in centimeters.

businessContext_i18n.en: Height from crown to base of skull in centimeters.
businessContext_i18n.de: Höhe vom Scheitel bis zur Schädelbasis in Zentimetern.
businessContext_i18n.fr: Hauteur du sommet à la base du crâne en centimètres.
businessContext_i18n.es: Altura desde la coronilla hasta la base del cráneo en centímetros.

inputs.label: Output Unit Factor
inputs.businessContext: Multiply output lengths by this factor (1 for cm, 0.3937 for inches).

businessContext_i18n.en: Multiply output lengths by this factor (1 for cm, 0.3937 for inches).
businessContext_i18n.tr: Çıktı uzunluklarını bu faktörle çarpın (cm için 1, inç için 0,3937).
businessContext_i18n.de: Multiplizieren Sie die Ausgabelängen mit diesem Faktor (1 für cm, 0,3937 für Zoll).
businessContext_i18n.fr: Multiplier les longueurs de sortie par ce facteur (1 pour cm, 0,3937 pour pouces).
businessContext_i18n.es: Multiplicar las longitudes de salida por este factor (1 para cm, 0.3937 para pulgadas).

inputs.label: Scale Factor
inputs.businessContext: Multiplier to adjust circumference for growth or fitting allowance.

businessContext_i18n.en: Multiplier to adjust circumference for growth or fitting allowance.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Büyüme veya uyum payı için çevreyi ayarlamak üzere çarpan.
businessContext_i18n.de: Multiplikator zur Anpassung des Umfangs für Wachstum oder Passformzugabe.
businessContext_i18n.fr: Multiplicateur pour ajuster le périmètre en fonction de la croissance ou de la marge d'ajustement.
businessContext_i18n.es: Multiplicador para ajustar el perímetro por crecimiento o margen de ajuste.

suggestedActions: Review inputs and verify results against site standards.
